title: CLI action execution, confirmation flag, and failure logs
action: Make sright-cli expose Phase 2 actions safely without changing the existing action run shape except adding a confirmation flag.
implementation: Keep existing config enabled/menu enabled gating.
When execute_action fails, log selected_count from the original request instead of 0.

Add CLI tests for representative copy action JSON, disabled menu blocking, unknown action blocking, dangerous action without confirmation failing, and dangerous action with confirmation in temp fixtures.

criteria: cargo test -p sright-cli --test cli_smoke exits zero
